review_criteria: Verify git show strictly matches the execution result artifact.
Verify that src/mcp-server/src/index.ts path resolution logic checks process.env.PROJECT_ROOT/.agent-state/workflow/dispatch.json and iteration-state.json and falls back to workflow/.
Verify that src/mcp-server/src/dag-parser.ts is created and exports parseWorkflow.
Verify NO implementation of the dynamic LLM router occurred.
Verify NO review automation daemons were implemented.
Verify NO removal of legacy tooling occurred.
Verify NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics occurred in the commit.
Verify artifact changes are strictly limited to allowed_artifacts.
